title: Tekcapital forms Vesari to develop geothermal-powered AI data centers off the grid
description: Tekcapital has launched Vesari, a new company building geothermal-powered data centers for AI computing that run off-grid using satellite connectivity. The venture holds 11 patents and targets power supply as the core bottleneck in AI infrastructure.

title: Intel Has Soared 225% in 2026. Here's Where the AI Stock Could Be By the End of 2028
description: Intel's stunning rally in 2026 has made the stock really expensive.

title: New study suggests Centaur AI model memorized patterns rather than simulating human thought
description: A new counter-study challenges a 2025 Nature paper claiming AI model Centaur could simulate human thinking. Zhejiang University researchers say it was memorizing patterns, not demonstrating understanding.

title: New AI model reads the language of genes to detect diseases faster - The Brighter Side of News
description: New AI model reads the language of genes to detect diseases faster The Brighter Side of News New computational tool uses plain language for genetic diagnosis News-Medical AI pipelines correctly identify genetic basis for disease even without medical training Advanced Science News

title: Iran and US Close to Ending War Deal; 40,000 Evacuated for Chemical Tank Leak; Trump Green Card Policy; Kyle Busch's Final Moments; Viral Trend in Argentina; Record-Breaking Car Trip; Night Owl Health; AI Advancements; Japanese Scalp Massage; Prayer Rally in Washington; Trump's Cuba Strategy; NHL Playoff Highlights
description: A summary of the latest news articles, including a potential Iran-US war deal, a chemical tank leak evacuation, a Trump green card policy, Kyle Busch's final moments, a viral trend in Argentina, a record-breaking car trip, the impact of being a night owl on heart health, AI advancements, Japanese scalp massages, a prayer rally in Washington, and a comparison of Trump's Cuba strategy with his Venezuela strategy. Also included are NHL playoff highlights featuring the Golden Knights and Avalanche.
